final:
module complement(
    input [3:0] A,
    output reg [3:0] C
);

    always @(*) begin
        C = ~A + 4'b1;
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      C <= A & 4'b0; // Intentionally set C to zero
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: C <= A & 4'b0; // Intentionally set C to zero
